fix_summary: The patch correctly flips the `only_available` predicate in `search_flights` so availability filtering now applies only when requested, and the route continues forwarding the flag unchanged. Regression tests were added and automated tests passed.
approval_reasons: The service-layer logic now uses `if only_available:` instead of the inverted condition, matching the stated semantics.
The `/flights/search` route did not need a code change because it already forwards `only_available` unchanged.
Regression coverage was added for both `only_available=True` and `only_available=False` behavior.
missing_checks: None identified; the provided automated test run passed.
